name: Minimalism & Swiss Style
description: Enterprise apps, dashboards, documentation sites, SaaS platforms, professional tools

antiPatterns: Do not add decorative shadows or gradients; keep surfaces flat.
Do not introduce more than one accent colour.

name: Neumorphism
description: Health/wellness apps, meditation platforms, fitness trackers, minimal interaction UIs

antiPatterns: Do not use on data-dense or high-contrast-required screens (low contrast).
Do not mix hard borders with the soft emboss.

name: Glassmorphism
description: Modern SaaS, financial dashboards, high-end corporate, lifestyle apps, modal overlays, navigation

styleKit.rawDesignSystemVariables: --blur-amount: 15px, --glass-opacity: 0.15, --border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2), --background: vibrant color, --text-color: light/dark based on BG

name: Brutalism
description: Design portfolios, artistic projects, counter-culture brands, editorial/media sites, tech blogs

antiPatterns: Do not soften corners or add smooth transitions.
Do not use subtle low-contrast palettes.

name: 3D & Hyperrealism
description: Gaming, product showcase, immersive experiences, high-end e-commerce, architectural viz, VR/AR

name: Vibrant & Block-based
description: Startups, creative agencies, gaming, social media, youth-focused, entertainment, consumer

antiPatterns: Do not crowd blocks; preserve large 48px+ gaps.
Do not drop below 7:1 contrast on vibrant fills.

name: Dark Mode (OLED)
description: Night-mode apps, coding platforms, entertainment, eye-strain prevention, OLED devices, low-light

antiPatterns: Do not emit large pure-white fills; keep white emission low.
Do not rely on colour alone for focus; keep a visible focus ring.

name: Accessible & Ethical
description: Government, healthcare, education, inclusive products, large audience, legal compliance, public

name: Claymorphism
description: Educational apps, children's apps, SaaS platforms, creative tools, fun-focused, onboarding, casual games

antiPatterns: Do not use hard lines; keep edges soft and puffy.
Do not pair with harsh high-contrast palettes.

name: Aurora UI
description: Modern SaaS, creative agencies, branding, music platforms, lifestyle, premium products, hero sections

name: Retro-Futurism
description: Gaming, entertainment, music platforms, tech brands, artistic projects, nostalgic, cyberpunk

name: Flat Design
description: Web apps, mobile apps, cross-platform, startup MVPs, user-friendly, SaaS, dashboards, corporate

antiPatterns: Do not add gradients or drop shadows.
Do not use skeuomorphic textures.

name: Skeuomorphism
description: Legacy apps, gaming, immersive storytelling, premium products, luxury, realistic simulations, education

name: Liquid Glass
description: Premium SaaS, high-end e-commerce, creative platforms, branding experiences, luxury portfolios

name: Motion-Driven
description: Portfolio sites, storytelling platforms, interactive experiences, entertainment apps, creative, SaaS

name: Micro-interactions
description: Mobile apps, touchscreen UIs, productivity tools, user-friendly, consumer apps, interactive components

name: Inclusive Design
description: Public services, education, healthcare, finance, government, accessible consumer, inclusive

name: Zero Interface
description: Voice assistants, AI platforms, future-forward UX, smart home, contextual computing, ambient experiences

styleKit.rawDesignSystemVariables: --voice-ui: enabled, --gesture-detection: active, --ai-predictions: smart, --progressive-disclosure: true, --visible-ui: minimal, --context-aware: true

name: Soft UI Evolution
description: Modern enterprise apps, SaaS platforms, health/wellness, modern business tools, professional, hybrid

antiPatterns: Do not drop below WCAG AA contrast for the sake of softness.
Do not deepen shadows into neumorphism's low-contrast emboss.

name: Hero-Centric Design
description: SaaS landing pages, product launches, service landing pages, B2B platforms, tech companies

name: Conversion-Optimized
description: E-commerce product pages, free trial signups, lead generation, SaaS pricing pages, limited-time offers

name: Feature-Rich Showcase
description: Enterprise SaaS, software tools landing pages, platform services, complex product explanations, B2B products

name: Minimal & Direct
description: Simple service landing pages, indie products, consulting services, micro SaaS, freelancer portfolios

name: Social Proof-Focused
description: B2B SaaS, professional services, premium products, e-commerce conversion pages, established brands

name: Interactive Product Demo
description: SaaS platforms, tool/software products, productivity apps landing pages, developer tools, productivity software

name: Trust & Authority
description: Healthcare/medical landing pages, financial services, enterprise software, premium/luxury products, legal services

name: Storytelling-Driven
description: Brand/startup stories, mission-driven products, premium/lifestyle brands, documentary-style products, educational

name: Data-Dense Dashboard
description: Business intelligence dashboards, financial analytics, enterprise reporting, operational dashboards, data warehousing

name: Heat Map & Heatmap Style
description: Geographical analysis, performance matrices, correlation analysis, user behavior heatmaps, temperature/intensity data

name: Executive Dashboard
description: C-suite dashboards, business summary reports, decision-maker dashboards, strategic planning views

name: Real-Time Monitoring
description: System monitoring dashboards, DevOps dashboards, real-time analytics, stock market dashboards, live event tracking

name: Drill-Down Analytics
description: Sales analytics, product analytics, funnel analysis, multi-dimensional data exploration, business intelligence

name: Comparative Analysis Dashboard
description: Period-over-period reporting, A/B test dashboards, market comparison, competitive analysis, regional performance

name: Predictive Analytics
description: Forecasting dashboards, anomaly detection systems, trend prediction dashboards, AI-powered analytics, budget planning

name: User Behavior Analytics
description: Conversion funnel analysis, user journey tracking, engagement analytics, cohort analysis, retention tracking

name: Financial Dashboard
description: Financial reporting, accounting dashboards, portfolio tracking, budget monitoring, banking analytics

name: Sales Intelligence Dashboard
description: CRM dashboards, sales management, opportunity tracking, performance management, quota planning

name: Neubrutalism
description: Gen Z brands, startups, creative agencies, Figma-style apps, Notion-style interfaces, tech blogs

antiPatterns: Do not round the corners or blur the shadow.
Do not desaturate; keep high-saturation blocks.

name: Bento Box Grid
description: Dashboards, product pages, portfolios, Apple-style marketing, feature showcases, SaaS

name: Y2K Aesthetic
description: Fashion brands, music platforms, Gen Z brands, nostalgia marketing, entertainment, youth-focused

name: Cyberpunk UI
description: Gaming platforms, tech products, crypto apps, sci-fi applications, developer tools, entertainment

name: Organic Biophilic
description: Wellness apps, sustainability brands, eco products, health apps, meditation, organic food brands

antiPatterns: Do not use sharp geometric corners; favour organic curves.
Do not use harsh neon palettes.

name: AI-Native UI
description: AI products, chatbots, voice assistants, copilots, AI-powered tools, conversational interfaces

name: Memphis Design
description: Creative agencies, music sites, youth brands, event promotion, artistic portfolios, entertainment

name: Vaporwave
description: Music platforms, gaming, creative portfolios, tech startups, entertainment, artistic projects

name: Dimensional Layering
description: Dashboards, card layouts, modals, navigation, product showcases, SaaS interfaces

antiPatterns: Do not flatten the elevation hierarchy; preserve distinct z-levels.
Do not animate layout-shifting parallax that ignores reduced-motion.

name: Exaggerated Minimalism
description: Fashion, architecture, portfolios, agency landing pages, luxury brands, editorial

antiPatterns: Do not fill the whitespace; oversized type needs room to breathe.
Do not add more than one accent.

name: Kinetic Typography
description: Hero sections, marketing sites, video platforms, storytelling, creative portfolios, landing pages

name: Parallax Storytelling
description: Brand storytelling, product launches, case studies, portfolios, annual reports, marketing campaigns

name: Swiss Modernism 2.0
description: Corporate sites, architecture, editorial, SaaS, museums, professional services, documentation

name: HUD / Sci-Fi FUI
description: Sci-fi games, space tech, cybersecurity, movie props, immersive dashboards

name: Pixel Art
description: Indie games, retro tools, creative portfolios, nostalgia marketing, Web3/NFT

name: Bento Grids
description: Product features, dashboards, personal sites, marketing summaries, galleries

name: Spatial UI (VisionOS)
description: Spatial computing apps, VR/AR interfaces, immersive media, futuristic dashboards

name: E-Ink / Paper
description: Reading apps, digital newspapers, minimal journals, distraction-free writing, slow-living brands

antiPatterns: Do not use fades or motion blur; transitions are instant page turns.
Do not use saturated colours; stay ink-on-paper.

name: Gen Z Chaos / Maximalism
description: Gen Z lifestyle brands, music artists, creative portfolios, viral marketing, fashion

name: Biomimetic / Organic 2.0
description: Sustainability tech, biotech, advanced health, meditation, generative art platforms

name: Anti-Polish / Raw Aesthetic
description: Creative portfolios, artist sites, indie brands, handmade products, authentic storytelling, editorial

name: Tactile Digital / Deformable UI
description: Modern mobile apps, playful brands, entertainment, gaming UI, consumer products, interactive demos

name: Nature Distilled
description: Wellness brands, sustainable products, artisan goods, organic food, spa/beauty, home decor

antiPatterns: Do not use cold neon palettes; stay in warm natural tones.
Do not over-animate; keep motion gentle.

name: Interactive Cursor Design
description: Creative portfolios, interactive experiences, agency sites, product showcases, gaming, entertainment

name: Voice-First Multimodal
description: Voice assistants, accessibility apps, hands-free tools, smart home, automotive UI, cooking apps

name: 3D Product Preview
description: E-commerce, furniture, fashion, automotive, electronics, jewelry, product configurators

name: Gradient Mesh / Aurora Evolved
description: Hero sections, backgrounds, creative brands, music platforms, fashion, lifestyle, premium products

name: Editorial Grid / Magazine
description: News sites, blogs, magazines, editorial content, long-form articles, journalism, publishing

name: Chromatic Aberration / RGB Split
description: Music platforms, gaming, tech brands, creative portfolios, nightlife, entertainment, video platforms

name: Vintage Analog / Retro Film
description: Photography portfolios, music/vinyl brands, vintage fashion, nostalgia marketing, film industry, cafes
